changelog:
Talken 2.0

✨ New:
- Forgot your password? You can now reset it with a verification code sent to your email.
- You can now permanently delete your account and its data whenever you choose.
- New Network & Connection panel with one-tap connectivity diagnostics.

🔒 Security:
- Password changes and account deletion are protected by email or password verification.
- Your login details and account key stay encrypted on your device.

🔧 Improvements:
- Automatic firewall setup so peers can reach you reliably.
- Automatic identity self-heal so people can always find you.
- Instant, no-freeze sign in and messaging.

📝 Notes:
Thanks for using Talken!
